response: 6703 is **prime**. It has no divisors other than 1 and itself. A quick check confirms it is not divisible by any prime up to 79 (the square root of 6703 is ~81.9).
reasoning_content:
We need to check if 6703 is prime. Let's do a quick primality test. First, note that 6703 is odd, not divisible by 3: sum of digits 6+7+0+3=16, not divisible by 3. Not divisible by 5. Check divisibility by 7: 7*957=6699, remainder 4, so not divisible by 7. 11: 11*609=6699, remainder 4; 11*610=6710, too high, so no. 13: 13*515=6695, remainder 8; 13*516=6708, too high. 17: 17*394=6698, remainder 5; 17*395=6715. 19: 19*352=6688, remainder 15; 19*353=6707. 23: 23*291=6693, remainder 10; 23*292=6716. 29: 29*231=6699, remainder 4; 29*232=6728. 31: 31*216=6696, remainder 7; 31*217=6727. 37: 37*181=6697, remainder 6; 37*182=6734. 41: 41*163=6683, remainder 20; 41*164=6724. 43: 43*155=6665, remainder 38; 43*156=6708. 47: 47*142=6674, remainder 29; 47*143=6721. 53: 53*126=6678, remainder 25; 53*127=6731. 59: 59*113=6667, remainder 36; 59*114=6726. 61: 61*109=6649, remainder 54; 61*110=6710. 67: 67*100=6700, remainder 3; 67*101=6767. 71: 71*94=6674, remainder 29; 71*95=6745. 73: 73*91=6643, remainder 60; 73*92=6716. 79: 79*84=6636, remainder 67; 79*85=6715. 83: 83*80=6640, remainder 63; 83*81=6723. 89: 89*75=6675, remainder 28; 89*76=6764. 97: 97*69=6693, remainder 10; 97*70=6790. We need to go up to sqrt(6703). sqrt(6703) is about 81.86, so we only need to test primes up to 79. We already tested up to 79. None divided evenly. So 6703 is prime.

Thus, quick sanity: 6703 is prime.
